title: Vanilla extra Variations
description: VeV adds blocks and recipes for a lot of the "missing" vanilla block models for what I consider "extra" textures.
body:
# **Includes recipes** for survival.

A lot of textures have missing blocks that look nice in my opinion,  
so here's all the **extra variants** bundled up in a mod!  
  
by extra, I mean not included in my other categorized mods, listed near the bottom.  
  
## **Included block types**:
**-button** | **-fence** | **-fence gate** | **-slab** | **-stairs** | **-trapdoor** | **-wall**
  
### [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or REI Recommended.  
[https://modrinth.com/mod/jei]  

**Extra chiseled slabs** and **chiseled walls** are included here, I think they look nice.

 +every chiseled variant can be cut from base material as well.  
**ex:** purpur pillar wall stonecut from a purpur block
 

**Notes:**  
 +**Certain recipes in this mod use the stone cutter**. Certain use crafty.  
Use logic, moss isn't going in the stonecutter lmaoo.  


## See the **Gallery** for everything included!

Feel free to modify this or use in any mod pack.  

Hope you enjoy!  

## Want more? I like more.

### **[VwV](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-wood-variations)** - wood!  
[https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-wood-variations]  
  
### **[VsV](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-stone-variations)** - stone!   
[https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-stone-variations]  
  
### **[VoV](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-ore-variations)** - ores!
[https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-ore-variations]  
  
### **[VcV](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-concrete-variations)** - concrete!  
[https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-concrete-variations]  
  
### **[VtV](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-terracotta-variations)** - terracotta!  
[https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-terracotta-variations]  

## **Questions** or you found a **bug**?  
Please, let me know on **Discord**. I **WILL respond** to an issue!  
Create a private support ticket/conversation with this channel:  
([https://discord.gg/VNAWJnyr7f])  
or feel free to dm me a comment! <3
